scripts.test:php: npm run wp-env:test -- run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist --no-coverage
scripts.test:php:coverage: npm run wp-env:test -- run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ vendor/bin/phpunit -c phpunit.xml.dist
scripts.test:php:setup: npm run wp-env:test -- run cli --env-cwd=wp-content/plugins/$(basename "$(pwd)")/ composer install
